scripts.build: pnpm --filter @code-artisan/shared build && pnpm --filter @code-artisan/iframe-runtime build && pnpm --filter @code-artisan/frontend build && pnpm --filter @code-artisan/backend build
scripts.sandbox:build: pnpm --filter @code-artisan/iframe-runtime build && npx @e2b/cli@latest template create code-artisan -p sandbox-template -d e2b.Dockerfile
